expectations.text: Sets acceptedDocuments to [IdCard(region: .us), DriverLicense(region: .us)] — does NOT put passports in acceptedDocuments
expectations.evidence: Line 48-51: settings.acceptedDocuments = [IdCard(region: .us), DriverLicense(region: .us)]. No Passport in this array.

expectations.text: Sets rejectedDocuments to contain Passport — does NOT use acceptedDocuments to exclude passports
expectations.evidence: Line 53-55: settings.rejectedDocuments = [Passport(region: .any)]. Passport is exclusively in rejectedDocuments.

expectations.text: Does NOT confuse acceptedDocuments and rejectedDocuments
expectations.evidence: acceptedDocuments contains only IdCard and DriverLicense; rejectedDocuments contains only Passport. Arrays are correctly separated.
